content.text:
<output>{
  "themeMovement": [
    { "theme": "cleanliness", "delta": 2, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "service", "delta": 3, "direction": "up" },
    { "theme": "staff_attitude", "delta": 1, "direction": "up" }
  ],
  "topPatterns": [
    {
      "patternId": "cleanliness-restroom-audit",
      "title": "Audit restroom cleaning frequency against peak traffic",
      "tailoredBody": "Two Reviews this week specifically named the restrooms as the issue, both on Friday/Saturday evenings. Double your cleaning intervals during those peak hours and photograph before/after for the team channel.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-neg-1", "starRating": 1, "redactedQuote": "Restrooms were filthy on Saturday evening — clearly hadn't been cleaned in hours.", "themes": ["cleanliness"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "staff-attitude-named-coaching",
      "title": "Coach the named team member privately within 48 hours",
      "tailoredBody": "A Reviewer named a specific bartender as being dismissive. Have a private, non-disciplinary coaching conversation in the next 48 hours — don't share the Review verbatim; paraphrase the behaviour.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-neg-2", "starRating": 1, "redactedQuote": "The bartender was rude and dismissive when I asked for a substitution.", "themes": ["staff_attitude"] }
      ]
    },
    {
      "patternId": "service-recovery-outreach",
      "title": "Run a service-recovery outreach to the week's unhappy Reviewers",
      "tailoredBody": "Three of the five Reviews this week were 1-2 stars naming service breakdowns. A personal apology + remediation offer within 24 hours halves the chance of a follow-up complaint reaching social media.",
      "evidence": [
        { "reviewId": "r-neg-3", "starRating": 1, "redactedQuote": "Worst service experience of my year — nobody acknowledged us.", "themes": ["service"] }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "overallTone": "concerning"
}</output>
